regulations.title: FDA Indirect Food Additives
regulations.scope: Adhesives, coatings, polymers, paper and paperboard in food contact.
regulations.compliance: Food contact notification (FCN) or threshold of regulation.

regulations.title: Generally Recognized As Safe
regulations.scope: Food contact substances with long safe use history.

regulations.title: Materials and Articles Intended to Contact Food
regulations.scope: Framework regulation for food contact materials in the EU.

regulations.title: Plastic Food Contact Materials
regulations.scope: Authorized substances list, migration limits (OML 10 mg/dm²).

regulations.title: Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation (2025)
regulations.scope: Reuse, recyclability, PCR content targets, bans on certain single-use.
regulations.compliance: Design for recycling, mandatory recycled content, 2030/2040 milestones.

regulations.title: California Proposition 65
regulations.scope: Warnings for chemicals causing cancer/reproductive harm.
regulations.compliance: Warning label if applicable; material disclosure.

regulations.title: CONEG Model Toxics Legislation
regulations.scope: Lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium sum ≤100 ppm; PFAS in many states.

regulations.title: State PFAS Food Packaging Bans
regulations.scope: Prohibits intentionally added PFAS in food-contact paper/board.

regulations.code: EPR Laws (ME, OR, CO, CA, MN)
regulations.title: Extended Producer Responsibility
regulations.scope: Producers fund recycling systems; eco-modulated fees.
regulations.compliance: Register with PRO, report material tonnage.

regulations.title: Directive 94/62/EC and national EPR schemes
regulations.scope: Packaging takeback fees; Green Dot or equivalents.

regulations.title: Dangerous Goods Regulations
regulations.scope: Air shipment of hazardous materials including lithium batteries.

regulations.title: DOT Hazmat Packaging
regulations.scope: Hazardous materials packaging for ground transport.

regulations.title: International Standards for Phytosanitary Measures
regulations.scope: Solid wood packaging material (pallets, crates) heat treatment or fumigation.

regulations.title: Pharma Packaging GMPs
regulations.scope: Primary packaging validation for sterile/terminally sterile products.

sustainability_frameworks.name: 4R Framework (Reduce, Reuse, Recycle, Recover)
sustainability_frameworks.notes: Base hierarchy for sustainable packaging design.

sustainability_frameworks.name: APR Design Guide for Plastics Recyclability
sustainability_frameworks.notes: US recyclability guidance for PET, HDPE, PP.

sustainability_frameworks.name: GHG Protocol - Scope 3 Category 4/9
sustainability_frameworks.notes: Upstream and downstream packaging emissions accounting.

sustainability_frameworks.name: Ellen MacArthur New Plastics Economy
sustainability_frameworks.notes: 2025 targets: 100% reusable, recyclable, or compostable; PCR content.
